description_text: CAR'S Store Item description Feature: Personalize and update your car, stylish design gives a customized look. Adhesive installation with some drilling by bodyshop, is easy to apply for most cars. Modification&cutting required to fit properly. Specification: Material:ABS Plastic Size:66 x 13.5cm Color:Carbon Fiber Universal fit for vehicles Package Included: 1 x Car Rear Bumper Spoiler cover 1 x Double Sided Tape set of screw Product overview Shipping Policy Payment Description Returns Policy About Us Item will be shipped out within 48 hours upon receipt of your payment. We ship the item through Hong Kong Air mail. Please make sure your address in eBay is correct. If you want to change the address, please give us ebay message right away you make the payment. Combing shipment is not allowed. If you wants to combine all the items together, you should still pay for all of the shipping, insurance and handing fees. Considering the cost of business and easy shipping, usually the item is packed in retail packaging.
